title: Medieval MC [FABRIC] MMC3
description: Version 1.21 | Medieval Fantasy RPG Adventure & Exploration Modpack everyone wants!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/PAld099.png)
![faetures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

⚔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/medieval-mc-fabric-mmc3)

⚔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

⚔️ Beautiful fully overhauled World Generation ([Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty))

⚔️ 5 New Dimensions

⚔️ Over 100 Quests

⚔️ Fight Challenging Bosses and discover Mythical Mobs

⚔️ RPG Classes and Magical Jewelry

⚔️ Gear Reforging and Scaling Enemies

⚔️ Immersive Thirst and Temperature realism

⚔️ Thousands of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Adventure Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/adventure-dungeons), [Soaring Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mss-moogs-soaring-structures))

⚔️ QoL Features like [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap)

⚔️ [300+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/35945/medieval-mc-fabric-mmc3); Heavily Customized for Mod Integration and Compatibility!

[![alt text](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fz4uivqmzunmkvtqd5hgu/tY38mPK.png?rlkey=qin5rs3z35sc2dgw82rrivsvp&st=5ikn6u6o&dl=1)](ttps://www.bisecthosting.com/p/lunapixel)
